googleMapsApiKey.title: Google Maps API Key
googleMapsApiKey.description: Google Maps Platform API key. Get one free at console.cloud.google.com (Places API must be enabled)

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Search terms (e.g. 'restaurants in Dhaka', 'hotels in London')

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max Results Per Query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum businesses per search (max 60 with free API)
